name: Compass Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Compass Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage, oncology-focused biopharmaceutical company developing proprietary antibody-based therapeutics. Its lead product candidate tovecimig is a bispecific antibody targeting DLL4 and VEGF-A for biliary tract cancer and other solid tumors. Other programs include CTX-471 (CD137 agonist), CTX-8371 (PD-1 x PD-L1 bispecific), and CTX-10726 (PD-1 x VEGF-A bispecific).
sellsTo: physicians and healthcare providers (future potential customers)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage, oncology-focused biopharmaceutical company developing proprietary antibody-based therapeutics to treat multiple human diseases.
Our pipeline consists of four clinical product candidates: tovecimig, CTX-471, CTX-8371, and CTX-10726.

catalysts.event: Report top-line data from Phase 2/3 trial of tovecimig in BTC including progression-free survival and overall survival
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report additional top-line data from this study in April 2026, including progression-free survival and overall survival.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 basket study of CTX-471 in patients with NCAM+ tumors
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate a Phase 2 basket study of CTX-471 in patients with NCAM+ tumors in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2 basket study of tovecimig in DLL4+ cancers
catalysts.sentence: We expect to initiate the study mid-2026 following a comprehensive analysis of the complete data set from the COMPANION-002 BTC trial.

catalysts.event: Present initial data from CTX-8371 cohort expansions at a major medical conference
catalysts.sentence: Initial data from these cohort expansions, as well as available data from the Phase 1 dose-escalation portion of the study, are expected to be presented at a major medical conference in the first half of 2026.
In the first quarter 2026, we received FDA clearance for the IND for CTX-10726 and the Phase 1 study will be open for enrollment in Q1 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 26,500 patients newly diagnosed with BTC in the United States each year and over 200,000 patients worldwide
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that there are approximately 26,500 patients newly diagnosed with BTC in the United States each year and over 200,000 patients worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Aggregate sales for checkpoint therapies is currently estimated to be approximately $50 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Nevertheless, aggregate sales for checkpoint therapies is currently estimated to be approximately $50 billion.
